metadata.title: You Validated Each Agent at 1%. The System Fails at 30%.
metadata.purpose: vox-explainer slate cut of Computational Skepticism for AI candidate 20. Source: books/computational-skepticism-for-ai/chapters/08-validating-agentic-ai-when-autonomous-systems-misbehave.md (cascading hallucination / multi-agent compounding, line 335, 343).
metadata.color_semantics: TEAL = correct/valid output / individual agent passing; CRIMSON = error / wrong output / compounded failure; GOLD = the key insight / cascading dynamic; SLATE = pipeline structure / agent boxes
metadata.note: EXCLUSIONS: no authority-laundering variant, no resource-exhaustion cases, no identity-confusion case, no compound-probability derivation beyond one multiplication
_variant_todo: rewrite every beat narration_text in the Teardown register (voices/teardown/VOICE.md + CLAUDE-BRAND.md) — voice only, facts unchanged
signature tangent 0-1 per video, ONLY on a clear opportunity (see SKILL)
swap the outro to the Claude outro from AUTHOR.MD :: NikBearBrown
then build audience-namespaced (audio in the new voice, scenes in the new palette)

skin_warnings: B01: palette=claude but the cold open is 'un-annotated' — COLD OPEN LAW wants ClaudeComposerAsk
B15: palette=claude but the outro is 'OutroCTA' — OUTRO LAW wants ClaudeTitleOutro

beats.narration_text: This is Liam, in for Bear. You validated each agent at one percent. The system fails at thirty.

card.copy:
You Validated Each Agent at 1%.
The System Fails at 30%.

build.suggested: suggested prompt: This is Liam, in for Bear. You validated each agent at one percent. The system fails at thirty.

beats.narration_text: Three agents, each tested and cleared. Agent A's error rate: one percent. Agent B: one percent. Agent C: one percent. The pipeline ships. The output is wrong. Not one-percent wrong. Thirty percent wrong. No individual agent was broken.

build.suggested: suggested prompt: Three agents, each tested and cleared. Agent A's error rate: one percent. Agent B: one percent. Agent C: one percent. The pipeline ships. The output is wrong. N

beats.narration_text: If every agent passed validation — each tested, each cleared — how does the pipeline fail at thirty percent?

props.headline: If every agent passed validation — each tested, each cleared —…

card.copy:
If every agent passed validation,
how does the pipeline fail at 30%?

beats.narration_text: Single-agent validation tests each component in isolation, against clean inputs. But in a pipeline, Agent B never receives clean input. It receives whatever Agent A produced. And if A was wrong, B amplifies that wrong with its own error — not adds to it.

build.suggested: suggested prompt: Single-agent validation tests each component in isolation, against clean inputs. But in a pipeline, Agent B never receives clean input. It receives whatever Age

beats.narration_text: Each agent treats the prior output as ground truth. It cannot detect that the input it received was already wrong. So the error doesn't accumulate — it cascades. The mechanism is conditioning, not addition.

build.suggested: suggested prompt: Each agent treats the prior output as ground truth. It cannot detect that the input it received was already wrong. So the error doesn't accumulate — it cascades

beats.narration_text: Every hop is a multiplication, not a sum.

props.headline: Every hop is a multiplication, not a sum.

beats.image_description: A close-up of a chain of mechanical links, with rust or damage visibly spreading from one link to the next

build.suggested: suggested prompt: Every hop is a multiplication, not a sum.

beats.narration_text: Agent A gets it wrong with one percent probability. Agent B receives A's output as fact and processes it. Wrong outputs compound. By the time you reach Agent C, the system failure rate is dominated by the cascading dynamic — not by the individual error rates. The interaction pattern is the failure.

build.suggested: suggested prompt: Agent A gets it wrong with one percent probability. Agent B receives A's output as fact and processes it. Wrong outputs compound. By the time you reach Agent C,

beats.narration_text: You validated each agent at one percent; the compound system fails at thirty.

build.suggested: suggested prompt: You validated each agent at one percent; the compound system fails at thirty.

beats.narration_text: You can't catch this by testing agents in isolation. What you need: validate the interaction patterns. Which agent outputs flow into which inputs. What monitoring detects runaway error propagation. What handoff conditions gate downstream agents on upstream output quality.

build.suggested: suggested prompt: You can't catch this by testing agents in isolation. What you need: validate the interaction patterns. Which agent outputs flow into which inputs. What monitori

beats.narration_text: Validate the interaction patterns, not just the individual agents — which interactions are permitted, what monitoring detects runaway loops.

build.suggested: suggested prompt: Validate the interaction patterns, not just the individual agents — which interactions are permitted, what monitoring detects runaway loops.

beats.narration_text: Individual validation is necessary. It is not sufficient. A pipeline of well-behaved agents can still behave badly. The failure mode has no single-agent analog. It only appears when the agents talk to each other.

build.suggested: suggested prompt: Individual validation is necessary. It is not sufficient. A pipeline of well-behaved agents can still behave badly. The failure mode has no single-agent analog.

beats.narration_text: A customer service pipeline: three agents, each tested. Agent one extracts the order number from the customer's message. Agent two fetches the record. Agent three drafts the reply. In production, agent one misreads order O-seven-eight-two-one as O-seven-two-eight-one — a one-digit transposition. Agent two fetches the wrong record. Agent three drafts a detailed, personalized reply about someone else's order. The pipeline was confident. Every agent was cleared. The error cascaded.

build.suggested: suggested prompt: A customer service pipeline: three agents, each tested. Agent one extracts the order number from the customer's message. Agent two fetches the record. Agent thr

beats.narration_text: Each agent passes. The pipeline fails. Because each agent conditions on the last — and error doesn't add, it cascades. Validate the interaction, not just the agent.

props.headline: Each agent passes. The pipeline fails. Because each agent conditions on…

card.sub: Validate the interaction patterns — not just the individual agents.

beats.name: OutroSeries
